children.heading: Treatment as expenses
children.label: a Treatment as expenses
children.text: A taxpayer may elect to treat the cost of any section 179 property as an expense which is not chargeable to capital account. Any cost so treated shall be allowed as a deduction for the taxable year in which the section 179 property is placed in service.

children.heading: Dollar limitation
children.label: 1 Dollar limitation
children.text: The aggregate cost which may be taken into account under subsection (a) for any taxable year shall not exceed $2,500,000.

children.heading: Reduction in limitation
children.label: 2 Reduction in limitation
children.text: The limitation under paragraph (1) for any taxable year shall be reduced (but not below zero) by the amount by which the cost of section 179 property placed in service during such taxable year exceeds $4,000,000.

children.heading: Limitation based on income from trade or business
children.label: 3 Limitation based on income from trade or business

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The amount allowed as a deduction under subsection (a) for any taxable year (determined after the application of paragraphs (1) and (2)) shall not exceed the aggregate amount of taxable income of the taxpayer for such taxable year which is derived from the active conduct by the taxpayer of any trade or business during such taxable year.

children.heading: Computation of taxable income
children.label: C Computation of taxable income
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, taxable income derived from the conduct of a trade or business shall be computed without regard to the deduction allowable under this section.

children.label: 5 Limitation on cost taken into account for certain passenger vehicles

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The cost of any sport utility vehicle for any taxable year which may be taken into account under this section shall not exceed $25,000.

children.heading: Rounding
children.label: B Rounding
children.text: The amount of any increase under subparagraph (A) shall be rounded to the nearest multiple of $10,000 ($100 in the case of any increase in the amount under paragraph (5)(A)).

children.label: 2 Election
children.text: Any election made under this section, and any specification contained in any such election, may be revoked by the taxpayer with respect to any property, and such revocation, once made, shall be irrevocable.

children.heading: Cost
children.label: 3 Cost
children.text: For purposes of this section, the cost of property does not include so much of the basis of such property as is determined by reference to the basis of other property held at any time by the person acquiring such property.

children.heading: Section not to apply to estates and trusts
children.label: 4 Section not to apply to estates and trusts
children.text: This section shall not apply to estates and trusts.

children.heading: Controlled group defined
children.label: 7 Controlled group defined
children.text: For purposes of paragraphs (2) and (6), the term “controlled group” has the meaning assigned to it by section 1563(a), except that, for such purposes, the phrase “more than 50 percent” shall be substituted for the phrase “at least 80 percent” each place it appears in section 1563(a)(1).

children.heading: Treatment of partnerships and S corporations
children.label: 8 Treatment of partnerships and S corporations
children.text: In the case of a partnership, the limitations of subsection (b) shall apply with respect to the partnership and with respect to each partner. A similar rule shall apply in the case of an S corporation and its shareholders.

children.heading: Coordination with section 38
children.label: 9 Coordination with section 38
children.text: No credit shall be allowed under section 38 with respect to any amount for which a deduction is allowed under subsection (a).

children.heading: Recapture in certain cases
children.label: 10 Recapture in certain cases
children.text: The Secretary shall, by regulations, provide for recapturing the benefit under any deduction allowable under subsection (a) with respect to any property which is not used predominantly in a trade or business at any time.
